title: EBS (Block) vs. EFS (File) Storage
description: Evaluate the characteristics and use cases of EBS (Block) versus EFS (File) storage. Choose the appropriate storage type based on requirements for IOPS performance or multi-node shared access.
objectives: Evaluate the characteristics and use cases of EBS (Block) versus EFS (File) storage.
Choose the appropriate storage type based on requirements for IOPS performance or multi-node shared access.
